phrases.intent_en: Ask what San Lorenzo is known for
phrases.text_local: Scusi, per cosa è conosciuto il quartiere San Lorenzo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, per KOH-zah eh koh-noh-SHOO-toh eel kwahr-TYEH-reh san loh-REN-tsoh?
phrases.cultural_note: San Lorenzo is Rome's university and artist quarter, known for its street art, alternative bars and the Verano monumental cemetery.

responses.english: For the murals, alternative bars and student life.
responses.phonetic: per ee moo-RAH-lehs, ee bar al-ter-nah-TEE-vee eh lah VEE-tah stoo-den-TES-kah.
responses.french: Per i murales, i bar alternativi e la vita studentesca.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find street art in San Lorenzo
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trovano i murales di San Lorenzo?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see troh-VAH-noh ee moo-RAH-lehs dee san loh-REN-tsoh?

responses.english: On Via dei Volsci and Via Tiburtina, high concentration.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah day VOL-shee eh VEE-ah tee-boor-TEE-nah, kon-chen-trah-TSYOH-neh AL-tah.
responses.french: In Via dei Volsci e Via Tiburtina, concentrazione alta.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how far San Lorenzo is from the Colosseum
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto è lontano San Lorenzo dal Colosseo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh eh lon-TAH-noh san loh-REN-tsoh dal koh-los-SEH-oh?

responses.english: About two kilometres, twenty minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: CHEER-kah DOO-eh kee-loh-MEH-tree, VEN-tee mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee.
responses.french: Circa due chilometri, venti minuti a piedi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which tram serves San Lorenzo
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale tram passa per San Lorenzo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh tram PAS-sah per san loh-REN-tsoh?

responses.english: Tram number three, from Termini station.
responses.phonetic: eel tram treh, DAL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh ter-MEE-nee.
responses.french: Il tram tre, dalla stazione Termini.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best late-night bars are
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove sono i locali aperti fino a tardi?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh SOH-noh ee loh-KAH-lee ah-PER-tee FEE-noh ah TAR-dee?

responses.english: On Via dei Sabelli and Via dei Volsci, the university area.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah day sah-BEL-lee eh VEE-ah day VOL-shee, DZOH-nah oo-nee-ver-see-TAH-ryah.
responses.french: In Via dei Sabelli e Via dei Volsci, zona universitaria.
